title: 修复无活动工单状态一致性

sources.reason: Detected the persisted no-active status inconsistency.
Generated status repaired by the canonical repair command.

riskAssessment.reason: No-active status must not persist transient changed-file state after a Work Item is archived.

executionDecision.reason: The canonical repair command and acceptance criteria are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the generated no-active status is clean and does not list transient changes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: No-active current_status.md reports absent worktree changes and clean ownership.
The repaired status and Work Item evidence are archived without changing runtime behavior.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The CI checkout after the release commit reported a no-active status that still persisted transient worktree changes, blocking quality.
constraints: Use the canonical repair command; do not hand-edit generated status.
Do not modify runtime or release behavior.
intent.rationale: Regenerating the no-active status removes stale lifecycle evidence and restores the required consistency gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No active Work Item status reports absent changes and clean ownership.
The status consistency gate passes after repair.
The repair does not introduce runtime or scope changes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
